history.text: Dutch Formosa appears in Taiwan's historical record.
The Kingdom of Tungning emerged, giving the area a defined monarchical state structure.
Qing rule placed the territory under outside administration.
Japanese rule placed the territory under outside administration.
ROC rule placed the territory under outside administration.
Retreat of ROC to Taiwan appears in Taiwan's historical record.

worthSeeing.title: Taroko Gorge:
worthSeeing.text: Marble canyon of spectacular scenery, one of Asia's most dramatic national parks.

worthSeeing.title: Sun Moon Lake:
worthSeeing.text: Taiwan's largest lake ringed by mountains and home to the Thao indigenous tribe.

worthSeeing.title: Jiufen:
worthSeeing.text: Hillside mining town of narrow alleys and teahouses said to inspire Spirited Away.

planningQuestions.a: Taroko Gorge, Sun Moon Lake, Jiufen.
